title: Location in a subitem do not show a map on click
excerpt:

posts.author: mnn (MNN)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
We are actively using Monday and are highly satisfied with the system and the opportunities it offers. A significant portion of our data is stored in subitems. This includes the functionality of having a map location. Unfortunately, it appears that the location feature is not functioning properly within subitems. Is this potentially a bug that others can test or is there a solution available? The location feature works perfectly fine within the main item; I have personally attempted to create a new test setup, but the issue persists.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mnn,

Sorry you’re experiencing issues here! I’ve tested this on my end and the map view functioned without error for the subitems. Would you be happy to elaborate a little further on the issue you’re experiencing so I can investigate further?

posts.author: mnn (MNN)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Bianca,
Yes I would like to help find the issue, please let me know how.
